name: podbng-lab
description: Virtual BNG (Broadband Network Gateway) lab environment provisioned via OpenTofu on Proxmox VE 9.1.5 (malik-pve01, 172.16.254.83). 8 VMs deployed using bpg/proxmox provider with cloud-init vendor/user data split. Used for testing IPoE/PPPoE subscriber management, DPDK/VPP-based BNG, and AAA.
currentPhase: Stage 1 Verification - fixing VRF, hugepages, cloud-init merge issues

tasks.title: Fix VRF on 6 VMs (live + template)
tasks.description: VRF missing on bng-1, bng-2, ctrl-1, ctrl-2, upstream-router, ipoe-client. Root cause: cloud-init replaces vendor data write_files+runcmd with user data versions. Fix: added merge_how to all role templates. Live fix: push 99-vrf-mgmt.yaml, install linux-modules-extra, modprobe vrf, netplan apply.

tasks.title: Fix ipoe-client cloud-init error (dhclient)
tasks.description: ipoe-client failed with PackageInstallerError: dhclient not found in Ubuntu 24.04. Fixed in template: replaced dhclient with isc-dhcp-client in packages list. Live fix: install isc-dhcp-client manually.

tasks.title: Complete Stage 1 verification
tasks.description: Verify all 8 VMs: hugepages=1024 on bng-1/2, VRF vrf-mgmt on all, IPv6 disabled, mgmt IPs reachable, cloud-init done, static IPs (eth3/eth4 on bng, eth1 on ctrl/upstream).

decisions.decision: Added pppoe-client VM (VMID 207) and renumbered aaa-test to VMID 208
decisions.reasoning: Testing plan requires PPPoE subscriber testing alongside IPoE. pppoe-client uses eth1 on bridge_access with rp-pppoe.so plugin. aaa-test shifted to 208 to free VMID 207.
decisions.impact: 9 VMs total now. New pppoe-client.yaml.tftpl created. cloud-init merge issue fix (merge_how) applied to pppoe-client template too.
